profiles.name: Lead & Cadmium (water)
profiles.notes: Literature benchmark (glassy carbon): 7.3 nM Pb2+ / 8.2 nM Cd2+ (SWASV). Re-validate on this ENIG SPE before trusting absolute LOD claims.

profiles.name: Formalin / Formaldehyde (fish, food)
profiles.notes: Amperometric oxidation at a fixed potential. Sample prep: aqueous extract of the fish/food sample.

profiles.name: Arsenic (water)
profiles.notes: Literature benchmark (ZnO/Fe2O3 on SPE): LOD 4.12 ppb, LOQ 13.74 ppb — below the WHO 10 ppb limit. Re-validate on this substrate.

profiles.name: Non-enzymatic Glucose
profiles.notes: Non-enzymatic amperometric sensing requires alkaline electrolyte, unlike the other (near-neutral/acidic) profiles above.

profiles.name: Arsenic — high-sensitivity (aptamer, EIS)
profiles.notes: Literature benchmark down to 3 pM / 0.75 pM depending on method — highest-ceiling profile in the library, requires the added aptamer immobilization step.
